name: payment_pressure_and_distress
caller_turns: I cannot pay the balance today. The pressure is too high.
My income has dropped and I am trying to work out what I can do.
I can try tomorrow, but I cannot promise three or five days from now.
I have already explained that I am under a lot of pressure.
I cannot sleep because of this. I need some time and support.
Please do not keep demanding an answer while I am trying to deal with it.

name: changed_card_and_failed_deductions
caller_turns: The previous payment did not go through and I do not understand why.
There was no money on the old card, so I changed the card this morning.
The deduction failed again after I changed it.
I tried to pay three or four times. I am worried the receiving account may be restricted.
I need to know whether the account details are official before I try again.
Please send any confirmed instructions through the official channel.

name: side_channel_payment_instruction
caller_turns: I paid yesterday, but the system did not show it.
I do not know which account I am meant to use.
Someone asked me to add them on WeChat and said they would send the account number.
They also mentioned a backup account and a public account number.
I do not want to transfer money to something I cannot verify.
Can you tell me the official next step?

name: time_request_then_cease_contact
caller_turns: I went to the bank, but I still cannot resolve this today.
I have already contacted the platform and asked for time.
I want to handle the money, but I need until later today.
I am under serious pressure and this has affected me badly.
Can you give me time instead of repeating the same question?
I do not need you to contact me again. Please stop calling me.
